title: Online Docs view doesn't work on Mac OS app

posts.author: alex.walton (Alex Walton)
posts.cookedHtml: My team has been starting to use the Online Docs view/app within Monday to pull in files to boards. It works really well in the browser instance of Monday but I prefer to use the Mac Desktop app for Monday. In the app, the Online Docs view doesn’t display any of the embedded links. Is this a known issue? Is there potential for a fix to be released?
